name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate over low heat.
2. Gradually stir in the cocoa powder and milk while continuing to heat. The consistency should be thick but not solid as you add the milk and cocoa powder.
3. Beat the sugar into the eggs.
4. Stir the hot chocolate/milk mixture into the eggs.
5. Add the cream and vanilla extract. Cool.
6. Just before adding to the ice cream maker, stir a cup of the ice cream mixture into the peanut butter. Once mixed, stir it into the rest of the ice cream mixture.
7. Freeze in the ice cream maker according to the manufacturer's instructions. Use fresh ground peanut butter if possible (it should be 100% peanuts).
